showcase.tagline: Find your passion in diversified sports & recreation activities.

programs.title: Upcoming programs
programs.subtitle: Discover your next session across our hubs.

details.football: Join our community football session for all skill levels. Warm-up, scrimmages, and team play on the main field.
details.tennis: An open tennis clinic covering technique, footwork, and friendly match play with coaches on Court A.
details.fitness: A morning circuit of strength, mobility, and cardio stations designed for every fitness level.
details.swimming: Structured lap swimming for endurance and recovery at the aquatic centre. All paces welcome.
details.badminton: Social doubles and mixers in the indoor hall — rotate partners and enjoy late-evening rallies.
details.yoga: A recovery-focused yoga session to reset mobility, breath, and balance after hard training days.
details.kidsAthletics: Fun athletics drills and games for kids — coordination, speed, and confidence on the main field.
details.hiking: A guided trail walk and hike with rest stops and scenic views. Families and first-timers welcome.

activities.title: Activities
activities.description: Explore diversified activities designed for all levels. No matter your passion, we have a space for it to thrive.

membership.description: Unlock classes, community programs, and exclusive member access — then manage it all in the PSR app.
membership.imageAlt: Badminton player mid-smash representing Persatuan Sukan & Rekreasi membership

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Look back at completed programs — stories, highlights, and every photo from the day.

community-football-day.title: Community Football Day
community-football-day.summary: Teams from across the hub gathered for a full day of community football.
community-football-day.description: Our Community Football Day brought players of all ages onto the main field for friendly matches, skills stations, and a shared celebration of the game. Volunteers, coaches, and families made it a highlight of the season.

open-tennis-clinic.title: Open Tennis Clinic
open-tennis-clinic.summary: An open clinic focused on technique, footwork, and fun rallies.
open-tennis-clinic.description: Members and guests joined coaches for an open tennis clinic covering serve basics, groundstrokes, and match play. Beginners and intermediates shared courts throughout the afternoon.

morning-fitness-circuit.title: Morning Fitness Circuit
morning-fitness-circuit.summary: An energizing outdoor circuit to start the weekend strong.
morning-fitness-circuit.description: Participants rotated through strength, mobility, and cardio stations in a morning fitness circuit. The session closed with a cool-down and community stretch on the studio lawn.

lap-swim-session.title: Lap Swim Session
lap-swim-session.summary: Focused lane swimming for endurance and recovery.
lap-swim-session.description: Lap lanes were open for structured swim sets and easy recovery swims. Lifeguards and coaches supported swimmers of every pace at the aquatic centre.

badminton-social-night.title: Badminton Social Night
badminton-social-night.summary: Doubles, mixers, and late-evening rallies in the indoor hall.
badminton-social-night.description: Our badminton social night filled the hall with friendly doubles, rotating partners, and plenty of smashes. New members found partners quickly and stayed for the full session.

trail-walk-hike.title: Trail Walk & Hike
trail-walk-hike.summary: A scenic group hike along the local trail head routes.
trail-walk-hike.description: Walkers and hikers set out together for a guided trail session with rest stops, nature spotting, and a picnic finish. Families and first-time hikers were especially welcome.

aboutPage.title: Built for an active community
aboutPage.lead: Persatuan Sukan & Rekreasi brings people together through sports, recreation, and shared movement — from first steps to lifelong passion.
aboutPage.story: We are a community association dedicated to opening doors to diversified sports and recreation. Whether you play for fun, fitness, or competition, PSR is a space to belong, train, and grow together.
aboutPage.mission: To make active living accessible, inclusive, and inspiring for every age and ability across our hubs.
aboutPage.vision: A thriving community where sports and recreation connect people, strengthen health, and create lasting friendships.
aboutPage.committeeSubtitle: Meet the people leading Persatuan Sukan & Rekreasi.

community.title: Community first
community.body: Programs and spaces designed for connection — not just competition.

access.title: Open to all levels
access.body: From beginners to seasoned athletes, everyone has a place to start.

active.title: Active life, every day
active.body: We encourage consistent movement through sports, recreation, and wellness.

aboutPage.ctaBody: Become a member and unlock classes, community programs, and exclusive access in the PSR app.

contactPage.title: We are here to help
contactPage.lead: Reach Persatuan Sukan & Rekreasi for programs, membership, events, or general enquiries. Send a message and our team will get back to you.
contactPage.detailsLead: Prefer a direct line? Use email, phone, or WhatsApp — or fill in the form and we will reply soon.
contactPage.imageAlt: Persatuan Sukan & Rekreasi community and sports

form.title: Send a message
form.subtitle: Tell us how we can help. Required fields must be filled before sending.
form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.note: We typically reply within 1–2 working days.
form.successBody: Thank you for contacting PSR. We have received your message and will reply soon.

errors.name: Please enter your name
errors.subject: Please add a subject
errors.message: Please write at least a short message
